rem зависит от родителя, em от корневого элемента
em используется для шрифтов, rem для отступов
options_en: em from parent, rem from root
rem from parent, em from root
em for fonts, rem for margins

Selects the parent if it has a direct child img

Selects only the first image in a block

hard.answer_en: Selects the parent if it has a direct child img

hard.answer_en: Container adapts to the parent size, not the viewport
